description_long: This is a bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock and fore-end, featuring a classic design reminiscent of early to mid-20th century military rifles. The stock is made from a light brown wood, smoothly contoured and extending from the butt to the fore-end, providing a sturdy grip and shoulder support. The barrel is long and slender, constructed from dark metal, and is secured to the stock with metal bands. The action and trigger assembly are also metallic, with a prominent bolt handle visible on the right side. Iron sights are mounted on the top of the barrel, with the rear sight positioned near the bolt and the front sight at the muzzle. The rifle has an internal magazine, with no detachable magazine visible, and the muzzle is plain, lacking any additional device.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock, long metal barrel, and iron sights, featuring a simple, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden stock, metal barrel, bolt handle, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the round barrel profile and the narrow width of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, metal barrel, and the absence of a visible magazine.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and the alignment of the barrel and sights.
